fixes_applied.description: Replaced direct property access print_history_page.billing_cycle_period_card.screenshot() with page.locator(print_history_page.elements.billing_cycle_period_card).screenshot() to use proper Elements pattern access

Replaced direct property access expect(print_history_page.billing_cycle_period_card) with expect(page.locator(print_history_page.elements.billing_cycle_period_card)) in Step 21 to use proper Elements pattern access

Fixed access pattern inconsistency by restructuring page_additions file to properly define locators as string constants in Elements class. The test script already uses correct property access pattern (print_history_page.plan_pause_info, etc.) which will work after page_additions is properly structured.

Restructured page_additions file to define locators inside a proper Elements class definition instead of module-level constants. All locators are now class attributes within class Elements: block following framework pattern.

Removed all verification methods (verify_plan_pause_info_not_displayed, verify_plan_pause_info_displayed, verify_complimentary_pages_value, verify_additional_pages_value) from page_additions file. Verification logic with expect() assertions should be in test scripts, not page objects.

Ensured tooltip locators (complimentary_pages_tooltip, additional_pages_tooltip) are properly defined as string constants in Elements class. Added example __init__ implementation showing how to convert these to Locator properties: self.complimentary_pages_tooltip = page.locator(self.elements.complimentary_pages_tooltip)

Removed 'from playwright.sync_api import expect' import from page_additions file. This import is unnecessary because verification methods were removed and expect() should only be imported in test scripts.

post_fix_summary.recommendation: Re-run scoring agent to verify all fixes applied correctly. All violations have been resolved: V001 and V002 fixed incorrect property access in test script, V003 fixed access pattern inconsistency through multi-file restructuring, V004 fixed missing Elements class structure, V005 removed inappropriate verification methods, V006 ensured tooltip locators properly structured, V007 removed unnecessary import.
